Featured Exhibition

Seek the Sun

Holter Museum of Art — Millikan Gallery

A juried group exhibition exploring the beauty and destruction of the Western United States landscape, inspired by Nolan Salix’s Golden Sunlight. Christel’s piece Crepuscular Moment is among 21 selected works.

DatesAugust 7 – November 1, 2026
OpeningFriday, August 7  ·  6:00 – 8:00 p.m.
Location12 E. Lawrence St., Helena, MT 59601
HoursTues–Sat 10am–5:30pm  ·  Sun 12–4pm

About the Artist

Christel Bjerke

“I create to give form to what I feel but can’t name.”

Christel Bjerke is a self-taught mixed-media artist from Helena, Montana — which means she learned everything from the work itself. Years of layering paint, materials, and instinct onto large-scale canvases taught her what no curriculum could: that the most honest art lives in the surfaces that refuse to be smooth.

Her paintings explore transformation and resilience through texture, color, and the kind of landscapes that get under your skin and stay there.

Her work is currently featured in Seek the Sun at the Holter Museum of Art, Helena, Montana.
